title: astragalus sempervirens
intro: Astragalus sempervirens, also known as milk vetch, is a perennial herb native to China and the Himalayas, belonging to the pea family. It is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects, making it a popular ingredient in traditional Chinese medicine. The health benefits of Astragalus sempervirens include boosting the immune system, reducing stress and fatigue, and improving cardiovascular health, among others. Astragalus sempervirens can be prepared in various herbal forms, including capsules, tablets, teas, and tinctures, which are often consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
